channel.title: The Dispatch | Ashforge Studio
channel.description: Notes on worldbuilding, running games, and the Edenfall Collection from Ashforge Studio.

item.title: Running Horror at the Table: A Practical Guide
item.description: I've never found anything harder to run than horror. Here's what I've picked up, most of it the hard way: slow dread, fair warnings, and never quite naming the monster.

item.title: The Crooked Mile Is Here: What It Is and Why I Made It
item.description: The Edenfall Collection started as a single encounter and grew into something I couldn't stop writing. Here's the origin of The Crooked Mile and what comes next.

item.title: Building Edenfall: A World Designed for Drop-In Play
item.description: Most settings ask DMs to learn a world before running it. Edenfall is designed the other way around. You run it first, then the world reveals itself.
